title: Falcon Night at the Theatre - 1000 Piece Jigsaw Puzzle for Adults - 1000Pc Adult Puzzles - Beautifully Illustrated Large Jigsaws & Fun Activity for Home, Rainy Days, Birthday Jumbo
features: ILLUSTRATED BY CLAIRE WILSON: This adults jigsaw puzzle is a beautifully illustrated large 1000 piece puzzle featuring a dynamic design bringing the scene to life, taking you straight to the bright lights of the theatre.
PLANET IN MIND: This 1000 piece jigsaw is a perfect choice for puzzle enthusiasts. The Falcon jigsaw puzzles are made from 100% recycled cardboard, made consciously, with the planet in mind.
FUN FOR ALL: Falcon de Luxe 1000 piece puzzle are a fun activity for the whole family. Play solo or as a group with family or friends, suitable for all skill levels from puzzle pros to novices.
GIFT OF PUZZLING: The jigsaw for adults offers a fun, challenging experience for adults puzzle enthusiasts or beginners. This 1000 piece adult puzzle is the ideal present for all skill levels.
CRAFTED WITH CARE: Enjoy the challenge of our 1000 piece jigsaw puzzles for adults. The 1000 piece puzzles are crafted with precision and care and are the perfect cosy stay-at-home activity.
description: Experience the glamour and excitement of a night out with the Falcon Night at the Theatre 1000 Piece Jigsaw Puzzle for Adults, beautifully illustrated by Claire Wilson. This captivating puzzle transports you to the dazzling lights and elegant atmosphere of a classic theatre scene, filled with rich detail and vibrant colour that make each piece a delight to place. Designed to offer a satisfying challenge, it’s perfect for both seasoned puzzlers and those new to the hobby. Made from 100% recycled cardboard, it reflects Falcon’s commitment to sustainability, allowing you to enjoy your favourite pastime while making a conscious choice for the planet. Each piece is precision-cut for a smooth fit and a seamless puzzling experience. Whether enjoyed alone or with family and friends, this puzzle is a wonderful way to unwind and connect. A thoughtful gift for birthdays, Christmas, or any special occasion, let the magic of the theatre unfold one piece at a time.
